name: Prodigi Print-on-Demand Fulfillment API
what_it_does: Prodigi print-on-demand fulfillment REST API for e-commerce merchants, artists, and brands to automate custom product printing and global order fulfillment across 50+ product categories including wall art, framed prints, canvas, photobooks, apparel, phone cases, and home décor — fulfilled from Prodigi's network of print labs across UK, Europe, USA, and Australia. Enables AI agents to manage product catalog for available print product automation, handle order creation for POD fulfillment automation, access shipping method for delivery option automation, retrieve order status for fulfillment tracking automation, manage image upload for artwork file automation, handle product detail for variant and SKU automation, access pricing calculator for cost estimation automation, retrieve webhook for order event automation, manage address validation for shipping automation, and integrate Prodigi with Shopify, WooCommerce, Etsy, and headless e-commerce for end-to-end print-on-demand automation.
use_cases: Automating print and fulfillment of custom wall art and canvas orders from e-commerce storefronts agents
Processing print-on-demand merchandise orders for creator and artist marketplace automation agents
Calculating printing and shipping costs for product pricing configuration automation agents
Tracking order production and shipment status for customer notification automation agents
not_for: Mass production offset printing (Prodigi is print-on-demand single-unit fulfillment)
Digital product delivery (Prodigi is physical print product fulfillment only)
Custom packaging or branded boxes (Prodigi is primarily product printing, not packaging)
best_when: An e-commerce store, creator marketplace, or dropshipping business wanting AI agents to automate custom print product fulfillment through Prodigi's global print lab network without holding inventory.
avoid_when: IMAGE QUALITY IS MERCHANT RESPONSIBILITY: Prodigi prints exactly what is submitted; automated low-resolution image upload creates poor-quality printed product with no refund; automated must validate image resolution against Prodigi's DPI requirements per product type before ordering. ORDER IS IMMUTABLE AFTER SUBMISSION: Prodigi orders cannot be modified after submission (they route to print immediately); automated order-with-errors assumption creates waste and non-refundable production; automated must validate order data completely before submitting. SANDBOX AND PRODUCTION USE DIFFERENT KEYS: Prodigi sandbox and production environments use different API keys; automated sandbox-to-production migration without key rotation creates sandbox order submission to production; automated must maintain separate key sets. SHIPPING CARRIER NOT GUARANTEED: Prodigi selects carrier based on lab and destination; automated specific carrier requirement creates inability to guarantee carrier choice; automated must accept Prodigi's carrier selection and work with tracking data provided.

auth.notes: Prodigi uses API key (X-API-Key header) for authentication. REST API with JSON. London, UK HQ. Founded 2013. Products: Wall art, framed prints, canvas, photobooks, apparel, phone cases, mugs, home décor. SDKs: None public. Print labs in UK (Pwinty), USA, EU, Australia. Ships to 200+ countries. 50+ product categories. PCI-DSS. GDPR. Competes with Printful and Printify for POD fulfillment APIs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free sandbox for testing; production charges per order (no monthly fee)
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-product cost + shipping; no platform fee; UK wall art from £2, canvas from £10; apparel varies
pricing.notes: London UK. Per-product + shipping. No monthly fee. Credit card required for production orders.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; order submission throttled; webhooks for order lifecycle events

known_agent_gotchas: IMAGE RESOLUTION VALIDATION REQUIRED: Prodigi prints exactly as submitted; automated low-DPI image creates poor print quality with no refund; automated must validate image resolution meets Prodigi's minimum DPI per product (typically 150-300 DPI at print size) before order submission

ORDER IS IMMEDIATELY ROUTED TO PRINT: Prodigi orders cannot be modified or cancelled after submission; automated order-with-mistake creates non-refundable printed product; automated must fully validate order (address, product SKU, image URL, quantity) before calling order creation endpoint

SANDBOX VS PRODUCTION SEPARATE KEYS: Prodigi sandbox and production are separate environments with different API keys; automated hardcoded sandbox key in production creates sandbox-mode production orders; automated must use environment-specific API key configuration

PRODUCT SKU SPECIFICITY: Prodigi products use specific SKU format encoding substrate, size, and finish; automated generic product ID assumption creates invalid_product error; automated must look up correct SKU from product catalog for each product type and variant

WEBHOOK PAYLOAD INCLUDES ORDER DETAILS: Prodigi webhooks deliver full order status updates; automated polling instead of webhook use creates unnecessary API load; automated should rely on webhooks for order status updates rather than polling
agent_readiness.security_notes: Print-on-demand fulfillment. GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key. UK/EU/US. Order and shipping address data.

security_score_components.security_notes: POD fulfillment. GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key. UK/EU/US. Order and customer shipping data.
